finding: Physical install and executable locations are provenance, not environment identity. Fingerprint package name, version, and manifest bytes; Node version and binary bytes; browser provider version, manifest bytes, and browser binary bytes. Keep lockfile, config, harness, writer, rows, platform, kernel, architecture, CPU, and product artifact bytes unchanged.
required_tests: Identical package manifests at different roots produce identical identities.
Version or manifest-byte drift changes package identity.
Location-only process, command, cwd, and raw-output drift does not change comparison identity.
Every retained semantic identity independently fails comparison when changed.
Product package-manifest drift fails artifact identity.
baseline_boundary: Apply byte-identical amended benchmark-control files to both roots while baseline product paths remain exact 293dcdf2.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
